description: Organize the case library into a jurisdictional hierarchy. Create a top-level collection named 'Case Law' containing sub-collections for 'Federal Courts' (with 'Supreme Court' and 'Courts of Appeals') and 'State Courts' (with 'New York'). Sort the following cases into their correct lowest-level jurisdictional collections: Brown v. Board of Education, Miranda v. Arizona, Gideon v. Wainwright, United States v. Aluminum Co. of America, and Palsgraf v. Long Island Railroad Co.
